set.body: Uncaught C++ cl::Error: clGetDeviceIDs terminates R during 'checking dependencies in R code' when backend Suggests are installed on headless builders (visible in local amatrix.Rcheck/00check.log). Kills R-universe Linux+macOS binaries for core; would be CRAN-fatal. Fix inside amatrix.opencl bridge: catch all OpenCL errors at every entry point, degrade to unavailable. Superseded structurally by the amatrix-tw4 dynamic-loading refactor which removes link-time OpenCL entirely. Acceptance: local R CMD check with all backends installed is abort-free and the NOTE disappears; R-universe core goes green on linux+macos.
set.title: R-universe red: core amatrix ERRORs on Linux/macOS builders — OpenCL clGetDeviceIDs probe aborts process during check
